message:
refactor(web): DRY path/query deserialization with shared helpers; add extractor integration tests

Extract repeated serde deserialization boilerplate from Path and Query
extractors into two shared helpers:

- deserialize_single_value<T>(s): attempts single-string deserialization
  via StrDeserializer, returning Option<T>
- deserialize_from_string_map<T>(map, label): builds a MapDeserializer
  from &BTreeMap<String,String> with a descriptive error label

This eliminates duplicated IntoDeserializer/MapDeserializer code in both
Path::from_request and Query::from_request, reducing the import surface
(serde::de::value::MapDeserializer no longer needed at the top level)
and making future extractors trivially consistent.

Add router integration tests:
- route_with_typed_path_and_query_extractors: verifies combined
  Path<UserPath> + Query<Pagination> extraction in a single handler
- route_with_typed_query_error_returns_400: verifies that malformed
  query strings produce a 400 Bad Request via ExtractionError

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
